description: True infrastructure freedom. Deploy on any Kubernetes distribution, any storage provider, any cloud or on-premises environment.

features.title: Any Kubernetes Distribution
features.desc: Works seamlessly with EKS, GKE, AKS, OpenShift, Rancher, k3s, and any CNCF-certified Kubernetes.

features.title: Any CSI Storage
features.desc: Compatible with all CSI-compliant storage providers - AWS EBS, Azure Disk, GCP PD, Ceph, Portworx, and more.

features.title: Data Sovereignty
features.desc: Full control over data locality, encryption, and storage backends - critical for regulated industries and compliance requirements.

features.title: Cloud, On-Prem, Air-Gapped & Multi-Cloud
features.desc: Deploy in public cloud, private data centers, edge locations, or fully disconnected environments. Run consistent database operations across multiple clouds and on-premises infrastructure.
